stories.title: How China is responding to the stalling of talks between the U.S. and Iran
stories.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks to Zongyuan Zoe Liu, a senior fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, about how China views the current crisis in the Middle East

stories.title: Trump doubts shooter motivated by Iran war as peace talks on hold
stories.description: A shooting incident at the White House Correspondent's Dinner took focus away from the war in Iran, as Iran's foreign minister planned to return to Islamabad, the site of previous peace talks.

stories.title: Iran's foreign minister leaves Pakistan, then Trump cancels U.S. delegation's travel
stories.description: After arriving on Friday, Iran's Abbas Araghchi has left Islamabad, prompting President Trump to announce that his envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer travel there Saturday for peace talks

stories.title: Vessels seized by the U.S. this week were part of a global 'shadow fleet'
stories.description: NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Elisabeth Braw, senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, about shadow vessels, after the U.S. military's seizure of two Iranian-linked oil tankers.

stories.title: Kushner and U.S. envoy Witkoff will head to Pakistan for new Iran talks
stories.description: Iran's foreign minister arrived in Islamabad, and the White House says Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will go there Saturday to try to "move the ball forward towards a deal."

stories.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire. And, Trump eases medical marijuana rules
stories.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks, President Trump says. And, the Trump administration is easing rules on medical marijuana.

stories.title: Thousands of seafarers stranded by ongoing U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: As the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports drags on, thousands of seafarers are stranded on ships, and economic shockwaves ripple around the world.

stories.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
stories.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
stories.description: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

stories.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

stories.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
stories.description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.

stories.title: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
stories.description: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.

stories.title: Tracking ships under fire in the Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Iran's top negotiator says it's "not possible to reopen" the strait due to "blatent violations" of US-Iran ceasefire.

stories.title: US and Iran 'locked in war of words' says Lyse Doucet
stories.description: The US confirmed on Tuesday night that the Vice-President's trip to Pakistan for a second round of peace talks has been cancelled.

stories.title: Iran says it has seized two ships in Strait of Hormuz after vessels attacked
stories.description: One of the cargo ships was 'heavily damaged' by Iranian forces, a British maritime agency reported on Wednesday.

stories.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
stories.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

stories.title: Iran’s top diplomat leaves Pakistan for Russia, Trump says Tehran can talk by phone
stories.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Sunday squeezed in a trip to Oman before returning to Pakistan and then heading to Moscow for talks in a frantic diplomatic shuffle as mediators pressed to reignite talks between Tehran and the US. But President Donald Trump stuck with h...

stories.title: Russian mercenaries in Mali: Limited gains, reports of abuse
stories.description: Russian paramilitary forces deployed in Mali have achieved limited gains in the fight against jihadist groups, according to Philip Obaji, Nigerian journalist and Daily Beast correspondent. Obaji pointed to ongoing insecurity and mounting allegations of abuses, raising questions o...

stories.title: Malian Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed by rebels
stories.description: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in coordinated attacks targeting military sites, officials said, marking a major blow to the ruling junta. The killing comes amid a surge in violence by jihadist and rebel groups, raising fresh concerns over security in the West Afr...

stories.title: Deadly Israeli strikes hit Lebanon despite ceasefire extension
stories.description: Lebanese state media reported a series of new Israeli strikes in at least four different locations in the country's south late Saturday, after Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ordered his military to attack Hezbollah following alleged ceasefire breaches. Attacks earlier ...

stories.title: Has Iran exposed the limits of what US can achieve by force?
stories.description: Political scientist Vali Nasr argues that US and Israeli military options ‘have come up short'.

stories.title: Israel issues forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon in escalation
stories.description: Hezbollah rejects allegations from Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu that it is undermining the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

stories.title: Iran shifts economic focus to essentials during war uncertainty
stories.description: The government is partly reversing a currency decision for basic items and tapping into the country's sovereign fund.

stories.title: US-Iran conflict: What’s the latest as the Islamabad talks stall?
stories.description: Washington and Tehran stick to their positions as mediators hope for a diplomatic breakthrough in US-Israel war on Iran.

stories.title: What lies ahead for Gaza after ceasefires in Iran and Lebanon?
stories.description: Regional de-escalation may shift focus to Gaza, where deadlock over Hamas weapons, future governance threatens 'truce'.

stories.title: Israel destroys solar panels in south Lebanon
stories.description: Israel destroys solar panels in south Lebanon

stories.title: FM Araghchi visits Pakistan for 2nd time in two days; envoy says trip undertaken to 'consult on regional developments'
stories.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was to head to Moscow on Sunday after a short stay in Pakistan, where he landed for a second time in two days following a trip to Oman as part of his tri-nation tour, a diplomatic source told Dawn. He is undertaking the trip against the bac...

stories.title: Trump, administration officials likely targets of shooting at White House correspondents' dinner: US official
stories.description: United States President Donald Trump and officials in his administration were the likely targets of a suspect who fired at a security agent guarding the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington, US Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said on Sunday. The incid...

stories.title: 'Great respect' for Pakistan and they will stay involved, but we are going to do it by phone: Trump on Iran talks
stories.description: US President Donald Trump reiterated on Sunday that talks with Iran would be held remotely and commended Pakistan, which has been playing a mediatory role between Washington and Tehran, saying that Islamabad would “stay involved” in the process. The US president’s remarks came du...

stories.title: Japan deploys 1,400 firefighters to battle raging wildfires in the north
stories.description: Japan has deployed 1,400 firefighters and 100 Self-Defence Force personnel to battle mountain blazes in ​the northern part of the country, with the fires, ‌now burning on Sunday for a fifth straight day, continuing to threaten a picturesque coastal town. The area consumed by the ...

stories.title: Pakistan notifies 6 land routes for transportation of goods to Iran amid blockade of Hormuz, Iranian ports
stories.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan has notified six routes for the transportation of goods to Iran against an encashable bank guarantee amid reports that thousands of containers destined for Iran are awaiting clearance at Pakistani ports. For this to come into force, the Ministry of Commerce ha...

stories.title: Six killed in Israeli strikes on Lebanon
stories.description: BEIRUT: Lebanon’s health ministry said Israeli strikes on Saturday in the country’s south killed six people, despite a ceasefire that was extended this week in the war between Israel and Hezbollah. “Two Israeli enemy strikes, on a truck and a motorbike, in the town of Yohmor al-S...

stories.title: Trump says U.S., Iranian officials can talk by phone
stories.description: Asked about NATO, Mr. Trump said he was “very, very disappointed” in the military alliance, which he has suggested the U.S. may consider leaving

stories.title: Israel-Iran war live: Trump says Iran can call U.S. if it wants to negotiate
stories.description: Iran FM back in Pakistan after Oman visit, says report; Iran's Foreign ​Minister Abbas Araghchi ‌held talks in ​Oman, discussed security ‌in the Strait of Hormuz, ‌broader ⁠Gulf waters, ⁠and diplomatic efforts to end the ​Iran-U.S. conflict, ‌according to Iran Foreign Ministry

stories.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint statement at BRICS meet
stories.description: Deeply polarised deputy FMs meeting in Delhi spell trouble for India’s BRICS Presidency; as the language of a joint statement eluded diplomats, India issued a ‘Chair’s Statement’ that reflected the subjects discussed

stories.title: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Army Chief Munir after returning to Pakistan
stories.description: Two Pakistani officials did not say when the Americans might return to the region to follow up on historic face-to-face talks earlier this month.

stories.title: Israel PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire with Lebanon
stories.description: Under the terms of the truce, which was recently extended, Israel reserves the right to respond to “planned, imminent or ongoing attacks” and has been striking targets in south Lebanon almost every day

stories.title: Trump, top officials likely target of shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner: U.S. Attorney General
stories.description: The suspect will be formally charged in federal court on Monday (April 27, 2026); Todd Blanche said he did not know if there was any ‘Iran connection’
